category_sources: source_facts.description says it manages Mender artifact files; official Mender docs describe Mender Artifact as the update payload format and mender-artifact as the utility for working with it.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official Mender docs use mender-artifact.
docs_sources: Official Mender documentation covers Artifact concepts, artifact creation, downloads, and the official repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/mendersoftware/mender-artifact, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Mender docs describe artifacts for secure update payloads; official GitHub README describes Mender OTA updates and the artifact library/CLI; source_facts.executables lists mender-artifact.
